notes: Skippable in-stream ads play before, during, or after other videos. Users can skip the ad after 5 seconds. The source states ads are 'at least 7 seconds long' (reservation context) and separately notes 'Videos under 3 Minutes' in a summary table. Headline and display URL (up to 255 characters) and call-to-action are available creative options. Companion banners (auto-generated or manually uploaded) can appear on desktop alongside the ad.
